title: Seagull

content:

Moving Platforms Implemented Your browser cannot play this video. Download video.
Final Result 📝 General Description # Project Overview # This 3D platformer prototype was developed in collaboration with Level Up Lab, a student team at Politecnico di Torino specializing in game development.
The project was a collective effort where I served as the Lead Programmer. I worked alongside three talented teammates who managed the music production, artistic direction, and project coordination. Our goal was to blend classic Nintendo aesthetics with innovative rhythmic mechanics.
Key Features # Reimagined Mechanics: We drew inspiration from titles like Super Mario Odyssey and Super Mario 3D World, implementing a fluid 3D movement system. Rhythm-Based Gameplay: The core innovation lies in the integration of rhythm game elements. Players must time their jumps and movements to match the beat on dynamic, rhythm-synced moving platforms. Musical Mushroom Power-up: A unique “Musical Note Mushroom” bonus that allows players to temporarily trigger a slow-motion effect (time dilation), making complex rhythmic sections more manageable. 🛠️ Technical Details # As the programmer, I was responsible for:
Developing the 3D character controller and physics. Implementing the synchronization system between the game environment and the audio tracks. Coding the power-up logic and the time-manipulation mechanics using GDScript. 🔗 Links # Github Code
title: Super Mario Music
